faqs.question: How can I get into Chouksey Group of Colleges for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Chouksey Group of Colleges has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
MBA/PGDM Candidate Upper age limit is 40 years for UR category, 45 years for PWD who belongs to UR category of Chattisgarh, 43 years for SC/ST/OBC and Female category of Chattisgarh, and 45 years for PWD who belongs to SC/ST/OBC and female category of Chattisgarh as on 1st of July of academic year.
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate who has passed Diploma in Engineering/Architecture from a recognised board/university with 45% marks for UR category (40% marks for SC/ST/OBC and PWD category of Chattisgarh) can also apply for the course. Candidate passing 10th/12th through distance learning/open school shall be eligible for admission. Candidate passed Diploma programme through distance learning shall not be eligible to apply. If the candidate has passed 10+2 examination, but failed in one or more compulsory subject than the candidate shall not be considered eligible for admission. If the candidate is declared passed with grace as per the rule of related board than the candidate shall be eligible to apply. Candidate Upper age limit is 30 years for UR category, 35 years for PWD who belongs to UR category of Chattisgarh, 33 years for SC/ST/OBC and Female category of Chattisgarh, and 38 years for PWD who belongs to SC/ST/OBC and female category of Chattisgarh as on 1st of July of academic year.
M.E./M.Tech Candidate Upper age limit is 40 years for UR category, 45 years for PWD who belongs to UR category of Chattisgarh, 43 years for SC/ST/OBC and Female category of Chattisgarh, and 45 years for PWD who belongs to SC/ST/OBC and female category of Chattisgarh as on 1st of July of academic year.
B.Pharma Candidate must have passed 12th with Physics, Chemistry and Maths/Biotechnology/Biology subjetcs from 10+2 education system of Board of secondary education Chattisgarh, or equivalent exam from any recognised board with minimum 45% marks (40% marks for SC, ST, OBC category and PWD candidate of Chattisgarh). Candidate must have pass separately in each of the 3 qualifying subjects Physics, Chemistry and Maths/Biotechnology/Biology (Theory and Practical). English subject in 12th is necessary for admisssion. The upper age limit for UR category is 30 years and PWD of UR category is 35 years as of 1st July 2020. The upper age limit for SC/ST/OBC and female of Chattisgarh is 33 years and PWD of SC/ST/OBC category and female of Chattisgarh is 38 years as of 1st July 2020.
M.Pharma Candidate must have passed Graduation Degree from any recognised university
D.Pharma Candidate must have passed 12th with Physics, Chemistry and Maths/Biotechnology/Biology subjetcs from 10+2 education system of Board of secondary education Chattisgarh, or equivalent exam from any recognised board with minimum 45% marks (40% marks for SC, ST, OBC category and PWD candidate of Chattisgarh). Candidate must have pass separately in each of the 3 qualifying subjects Physics, Chemistry and Maths/Biotechnology/Biology (Theory and Practical).

faqs.question: Which courses does Chouksey Group of Colleges offer to students?
faqs.answer: Chouksey Group of Colleges has courses such as MBA/PGDM, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, B.Pharma, M.Pharma, D.Pharma to offer. These courses are in the stream of Business & Management Studies, Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences. Chouksey Group of Colleges has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, M.Pharma specializations in Pharmacognosy, Pharmacology.

A total of 64 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Chouksey Group of Collegesand 43 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 43 students 16 were placed with median salary of INR 260000 and 5 students opted for higher studies.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Awesome study experience with knowledgeable faculty members.

review_content.Placements: My batch is very good, all are kind and supportive. Approximately 85% of students are placed in my course. The highest package is 9 LPA, and the lowest package is 1.5 LPA. Recruiting companies are Intellipat, Unacademy, HDFC Bank, etc. 75% of students got internships at Chola Mandal company. Top roles offered in course are assistant manager, executive, production, sales, HR manager, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good facilities and infrastructure with Wi-Fi, labs, projector, classrooms, and peaceful library with a newspaper stand. Facilities in hostel are great including water, theater, water coolers, and food. It provides hygienic food with medical facilities, club house, and ground for games.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027

review_content.Placements: 105 students are in our batch. The average package is 1.5 lakh, and while some students got internships, the college does not provide them. We get a degree in B Pharmacy and a license for opening a medical store. The B Pharmacy course is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a library with books provided, so we don't need to purchase them from outside; we get the books from the library itself and submit them after completing the semester. Labs are available for practical work, and teachers guide us through the practicals. Smart classrooms are provided, and hostel facilities are available for both girls and boys; the girls' hostel has only started in 2024.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I found few best teachers in this college.

review_content.Placements: For pharmacy students, there were companies which offered jobs as medical representative. But, for the last few years, there are no Pharmaceutical MNC offering job. Average package for pharmacy student is 2.5L - 4.0 L.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was good. The college had temple, garden, sports ground, canteen and free Wi-Fi in the campus. There were both indoor games and outdoor games, and had cricket ground and badminton court. The campus was under CCTV surveillance. Pharmacy building had well furnished laboratory, and library.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college, and I suggest you take admission to this college.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Our college invites more than 250 companies for placements, and students get a better experience. Good motivational speakers are also invited here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very good, and the hostel warden is also good. The hostel is decorated very well. Necessary food items are available at any time in the canteen. The canteen is clean and serves good and tasty for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides the best facilities and good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of the students from our course got placed. The salary package offered by Byju's is 1.2 LPA. A top recruiting company of our college is Byju's. Companies like Tata, Mahindra, Plant, etc., visit our college to hire students for an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in our course and department are Wi-Fi, labs, library, etc. The quality of facilities available in our college and hostel is good. The quality of served in a mess and canteen is better. Medical facilities, sports and games are better.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage of my branch is 30%. The highest package offered is 20 LPA by BYJU's. The average package is about 2-5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course are LG, Wipro, TCS etc. The internship percentage is not good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. The classrooms are neat and clean. But labs don't have the latest practical apparatus and gadgets, especially Chemistry and Physics labs. The hostel building is very good, and the rooms are very neat and clean. The mess is average as in other private colleges. Sports facilities are available, and the ground is also available for students to practice football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome study experience with knowledgeable faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good facilities and infrastructure with Wi-Fi, labs, projector, classrooms, and peaceful library with a newspaper stand. Facilities in hostel are great including water, theater, water coolers, and food. It provides hygienic food with medical facilities, club house, and ground for games.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment makes good study.
reviews.review_text: There is a library with books provided, so we don't need to purchase them from outside; we get the books from the library itself and submit them after completing the semester. Labs are available for practical work, and teachers guide us through the practicals. Smart classrooms are provided, and hostel facilities are available for both girls and boys; the girls' hostel has only started in 2024.

reviews.review_heading: I found few best teachers in this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. The college had temple, garden, sports ground, canteen and free Wi-Fi in the campus. There were both indoor games and outdoor games, and had cricket ground and badminton court. The campus was under CCTV surveillance. Pharmacy building had well furnished laboratory, and library.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college, and I suggest you take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very good, and the hostel warden is also good. The hostel is decorated very well. Necessary food items are available at any time in the canteen. The canteen is clean and serves good and tasty for students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best facilities and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our course and department are Wi-Fi, labs, library, etc. The quality of facilities available in our college and hostel is good. The quality of served in a mess and canteen is better. Medical facilities, sports and games are better.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied only with the degree.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. The classrooms are neat and clean. But labs don't have the latest practical apparatus and gadgets, especially Chemistry and Physics labs. The hostel building is very good, and the rooms are very neat and clean. The mess is average as in other private colleges. Sports facilities are available, and the ground is also available for students to practice football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average in every aspect of education.
reviews.review_text: Our mechanical department had labs wherein the equipment weren't functional. Only the first-year students had good facilities such as well-equipped classrooms with quality desks, chairs, etc. Food quality in the mess was above average. Sports and medical facilities were good.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides everything at a low fee structure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a Wi-Fi facility and labs, and the library has many books. Classrooms are clean and have smart class facilities. This college also has more than 10 lab rooms, and there are labs for every branch. The hostel has good and clean rooms, and the mess serves decent quality food. Everything is available in the canteen, and our college also conducts many games.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the Faculties and facilities but absolutely dissatisfied with non-relevant course.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, college has separate building for juniors and seniors to prohibit ragging. Gardens between the buildings and a huge playground make the atmosphere of college more joyful. Students develop a sense of sportsmenship during their graduation.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides the best placements in Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are good for students like labs, classrooms, and also the library. There is only a boys hostel which is located near the college. But the college arranges private hostels for girls. The college also provides bus facilities to reach the college from outer areas.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a good college. Placements were not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Some labs are good, but some labs are not properly working. Classrooms are average. The food served in the hostel mess is bad. Wi-Fi is working properly. The library is available for namesake. Overall the college is good.

reviews.review_heading: College is great for those students who want to learn something.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, provided with a Wi-Fi facility around the campus. Labs are well-maintained, and the library is well-furnished with the availability of books of different subjects. Classrooms are provided with a projector and smartboard. Food served by the college canteen is not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good. There are a sufficient number of systems for 30- 35 students. Each lab has at least that number of systems or even more. Classrooms are good, each having the capacity of 80 students. The sports room is not huge but is quite good. There are a badminton court, volleyball court and a cricket ground. In the cricket ground, you can also play football. The sports room has some indoor games like chess, carrom and table tennis. Quality of food is quite good. Hostel rooms are good and smal...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good. Labs were moderate. The library was not very good. Food served in the mess was very bad. The hostel is located at a long distance from the city. Quality of food was not good. Medical facilities were not available. Hostel rooms were very hot during the summer season.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with our college as there are placements, and the infrastructure is also good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi facility is available all over the campus. Labs are well maintained, and the library is also good with all the contents needed. The best part is the sports facilities. The canteen is not good, but the hostel rooms are okay. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college in Varanasi.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students get placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Mankind Pharma, etc. Almost 65% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college plays a vital role in the development of the college, as students are now focusing on the laboratories, classrooms, etc. The food is good.
content.Other: Pharmacy has more scope at present because medicine plays a vital role in human life.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: You need a minimum of 76% to be eligible for internships. Average and the lowest salary packages are offered in our course. About 95% of students get jobs at this college.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure with Wi-Fi, library, and hostel with bus transportation with labs and also best labs technical to support. Best hostel facilities and good quality of food available in the canteen, cafeteria. Sports and games are also held in systematic ways.
content.Faculty: We have the best teachers to teach you. They are well qualified, helpful, and knowledgeable. It is not very difficult to pass the semester exams, and 65% is the pass percentage. The course curriculum is relevant and it makes students industry-ready.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Facilities and teachers are very good.

content.Placements: Almost 57% of the students got placed in our course. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Lupin, Mecloacd, Cipla and Torrent. Almost 90% of the students got internships in companies like Cipla, Mankind, Dabur, Himalaya and Dettol.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available here, and there are labs for subjects requirements like biochemistry, anatomy, pharmacology, etc. Classrooms are big, neat and clean. Buildings are big and separate according to the course. Hostel facilities are very good which contains all the medical support, canteen, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college is totally worth it.

content.Placements: There are only average placements in this college. Only some companies visit the college for placements. Above 65% of students got internships from our B.Pharma course in companies like Johnson and Johnson, Cipla, Mankind and other companies. Many roles are offered by companies like MR (medical representative), worker, managing and many more jobs.
content.Infrastructure: There is a huge area to play. Good quality food is provided by the canteen and other ones. Medical facilities are also available for games. The facilities and infrastructure are available. For our course/department, Wi-Fi is available at a higher level, and there are well-maintained labs. There are very much clean and high tech classrooms, along with a huge library which has high-class things.

individual_reviews.title: My Diploma was completed at Kalaniketan College.

content.Placements: This is a government college, so campus recruitment is compulsory in this college. You complete your Diploma, and then you can get admission through lateral entry in any degree college, which provides you with a one-year discount in a 4-year course, making it a 3-year course for students in the lateral entry program.
content.Infrastructure: This college has a library, so you can issue books for reading and return them after the exam with no charges applied. Technical labs are available in this college. individual_reviews.title: My college is the worst decision.

faqs.answer: A:    GN Group of Institutes MBA fee structure is a cumulative of the various components, such as such as the tuition fees, one-time fees, registration fees, and exam fees, among others. Tuition fee is the most major component included in the fee structure. The total tuition fee for the two-year MBA programme at GN Group of Institutes is INR 2.46 lakh. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Neither the worst nor best, but worth the money you spend.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students were placed in the AI & ML program. I'm a first-year student, so I can't be sure what package I will have in the near future, but I have witnessed seniors getting packages of 3-4 LPA and maxing out at around 6-7 LPA. Infosys is one of our active recruiters. As for internships, almost every student gets an internship, whether paid or unpaid, depending on their skills.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and hostel facilities are not top-notch, but they are worth the money. You can access Wi-Fi throughout the campus. As for hostels, you will receive your own personal Wi-Fi. Hostels, library, and classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and hostels provide mess and transport facilities.

content.Placements: B.Com LL.B is a law course, and 90 percent of students continue their internship on their own references, and it does not need any placement to get internships or practice in courts, so there's no need for placement. I honestly didn't know about the mess because I'm doing it from my hometown. The college has 2-3 canteens. It also has medical facilities.

admission_process.title: GN Group of Institutes Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: GN Group of Institutes (GNIT-IPU) admissions 2025are open for courses in Pharmacy, with distinct specialisations in Science, Medicine & Health Sciences, Accounting and Commerce, IT & Software, etc. These are BBA, BCA, BTech, BCom, BPharm, MBA, LLB, BA LLB, etc., given in the universities-AKTU,GGSIPU&CCSU. GN Group of Institutes admissions depends on bothmerit and entrance. For admission to BTech and MBA courses, the institute accepts scores of entrance exams, likewiseJEE Main, CAT, MAT, XAT, etc., respectively. The students wanting to get admission to the college can apply online through the institute's verified website.
Check out the column below for admission details of theGN Group of Institutes:
Particulars
GN Group of Institutes Admission Highlights 2024
Mode of study
Admission Status
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

GNIT-IPU admission is depends on merit for most of the courses. However, for courses like BTech, the college accepts a score ofJEE Main. Further, the shortlisted candidates are given seats through the counselling process as per the guidelines of the respective affiliating universities. Check below the eligibility, fee and selection criteria for theGN Group of Institutes course admissions:
Eligibility:Bachelor's degree course with at least 50% aggregate
Selection Criteria:Merit-based +CAT/CMAT/MAT/XAT/ATMA
Eligibility:Class 12 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate
Selection Criteria:Merit-based
Eligibility:Class 12 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate for General and OBC (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) for Greater Noida College
Class 12 with at least 55% aggregate in PCM for Greater Noida Institute of Technology
Selection Criteria:JEE Main/ JEECUP + Counselling
Eligibility:Class 12 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate withMathematics
Selection Criteria:Merit-based + Counselling as per CCSU
Eligibility:3 years bachelor's degree with minimum 45% aggregate
Selection Criteria:Merit-based + Counselling as per CCSU
Eligibility:Class 12 with at least 44.5% aggregate
Selection Criteria:Merit-based + Counselling as per CCSU
The admission process for GNIT-IPU is a detailed process inclusive of application, appearance in the selection rounds, offline admission process, and document verification.

Application Form:Interested students shoul start by filling out the official application form, which is available on the website or can get from the admission office. Students should pay an application fee, i.e., Rs.1,000 for each course. The application fee for PGDM isINR 2,000.

Eligibility Criteria:Students should review and meet the eligibility criteria specified for the respective courses. This may has minimum educational qualifications, subject prerequisites, and other specific requirements.
Merit-Based Selection:Admission to some courses depends on merit, considering the candidate's academic performance in qualifying examinations.

Submission of Documents:Shortlisted students are required to submit documents, including educational certificates, identification proof, and passport-sized photographs, as part of the verification process.

Fee Payment:Once selected, candidates should complete the admission formalities by paying the prescribed fees within the stipulated time frame. Details about the fee structure are provided in the admission brochure.
Orientation:Admitted students may be required to attend an orientation program, where they will receive essential information about the institute, academic policies, and other details.

faqs.question: What is the salary package offered to MBA students in GN Group of Institutes placement drive?
faqs.answer: GNIT College of Management, a constituent unit of GN Group of Institutes, offers MBA Elite programme to eligible applicants. Students enrolled in the programme are offered placement opportunities through the campus placement drives. Based on the college's placement report for the year 2023, the average salary package offered to MBA students ranged between INR 10 LPA and INR 15 LPA. The highest salary package recorded during the same year was INR 50 LPA.

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after pursuing an MBA at GN Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: Yes, GN Group of Institutes graduates have a plethora of career opportunities after pursuing an MBA . MBA degree holders get a recognised degree from AKTU, which makes them eligible for various jobs in the government sector. These jobs provide job security, recognition, and good salary packages among various other perks. Tabulated below are some of the job profiles for students to pursue after completion of MBA at GN Group of Institutes: Government Job Profiles after an MBA Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Grade B Officer Indian Railways Management Service (IRMS) Central Excise and Customs Inspector (C&CE) Security and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) Grade A Officer Probationary Officer in Banks Quality Assurance Manager

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.Com course at the GN Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: BCom course fee structure at GN Group of Institutes includes tuition, hostel and one-time payment. The tuition fee for BCom is INR 1.4 lakhs. The hostel fee is INR 2.55 lakhs. Consists of an application fee of INR 1,000. The total amount involved, thus integrating all the fee components, will come to approximately INR 3.93 lakhs. faqs.question: What is the course fees for the two-year MBA in GN Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: GN Group of Institutes MBA fee structure is a cumulative of the various components, such as such as the tuition fees, one-time fees, registration fees, and exam fees, among others. Tuition fee is the most major component included in the fee structure. The total tuition fee for the two-year MBA programme at GN Group of Institutes is INR 2.46 lakh. It is divided into equal annual instalments of INR 1.23 lakh. This amount also includes the charges for the Book Bank. NOTE: The mentioned fees are sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.
